diagrams.title: UDP Header Format
diagrams.description: Shows the 8-byte UDP header with four 16-bit fields
diagrams.purpose: Learn the exact structure and field sizes of UDP datagram

diagrams.title: UDP vs TCP Header Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of UDP (8 bytes) and TCP (20+ bytes) headers
elements: Highlight: Sequence Number, Acknowledgment, Flags, Window Size in TCP
Highlight: No such fields in UDP
diagrams.purpose: Understand why UDP is faster and has less overhead than TCP

diagrams.title: OSI Model with UDP Position
diagrams.description: Shows the 7-layer OSI model highlighting Transport Layer where UDP operates
elements: Transport Layer (Layer 4) - Contains UDP and TCP
diagrams.purpose: Understand UDP's position in the network protocol stack

diagrams.title: UDP Communication Flow
diagrams.description: Diagram showing UDP datagram flow from sender to receiver without connection
elements: No ACKs, no flow control arrows shown
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how UDP datagrams travel without establishing connection

visuals.title: User Datagram Protocol
visuals.description: Visual diagram for user datagram protocol
